scripts.harvest:fixture: node src/cli.js run --recipe recipes/convex.yaml --fixture test/fixtures/convex-github.json --out data --days 90
scripts.train-neural: node src/cli.js train-neural --examples data/training_examples.ndjson --model-out model-experiments/neural_reranker.json --eval-out evals/neural_reranker_eval.json
